name: Lloyd Doggett
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $254,582 for Lloyd Doggett in U.S. House, TX-37. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
